message:
fix: resolve gosec lint warnings in migrate_sync.go and migration_hint.go

Address lint warnings from PR#1514:
- G104: Handle or explicitly ignore error from backupFile.Close()
- G304: Add nolint directives for os.ReadFile with validated paths
- G306: Add nolint directives for JSONL files that need 0644 permissions
- errcheck: Explicitly ignore os.Remove error for cleanup (best-effort)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
